title: Quesalia 2026: Feria del Queso y Maridaje de Chelva
description: 5th anniversary edition of the Cheese and Pairing Fair in Chelva, celebrating artisan cheeses and food pairings.

title: Exposición de modelismo ferroviario con trenes en miniatura
description: Free exhibition of model railways featuring miniature trains in Gandia.

title: El Secreto de la Cofradía - Escape Room Gratuito en Benafer
description: A free interactive escape room experience in the small town of Benafer, where participants solve puzzles and riddles while exploring the municipality's streets, squares and landmarks through a mobile app.

title: Castillo de Fiestas - Visitas Guiadas
description: Guided visits to the Festival Castle with interactive activities including games, workshops and photocall, exploring its history and role in the festivities.

title: The Burger Cup
description: A burger competition event bringing some of Spain's best hamburgers to Torrent.

title: Kroqueta Fest
description: The second edition of Kroqueta Fest featuring traditional and creative croquette recipes with live music.

title: Mig Any Fester - Mercado Medieval del Marítimo
description: Medieval fair on Valencia's seafront with 70 market stalls, shows and a children's Moors and Christians parade.

title: Feria del Vehículo de Ocasión de Valencia
description: Annual used vehicle fair with over 20,000 m² of exhibition space featuring 30 brands, seminew cars, km 0 vehicles and caravaning options.

title: FirAll Xàtiva - Feria del Ajo Tierno
description: Tenth anniversary celebration of the tender garlic fair combining agricultural tradition, local gastronomy, live music and family activities.

title: Mercado Artesanal de Tous
description: Artisan market with crafts, gastronomy, children's area, animal farm, donkey rides and theater performances.

title: Gran feria medieval en el Paseo Marítimo de Valencia con mercado, espectáculos y entrada infantil
location: Paseo Marítimo de Valencia, explanada junto al Hotel Balneario de las Arenas y la oficina de turismo
description: Medieval fair celebrating the Mig Any Fester del Marítimo 2026, featuring 70 market stalls with artisans and food vendors, Arab and Christian dances, live music, historical reenactments, and a children's Moors and Christians parade.

title: FirAll Xàtiva 2026
description: The 10th edition of FirAll, a three-day festival celebrating tender garlic with gastronomy, culture, music and family activities in Xàtiva.

title: Mig Any Fester de los Moros y Cristianos del Marítimo - Mercado Medieval
description: Medieval fair at Valencia's seafront promenade with 70 market stalls, shows and children's Moors and Christians parade.

title: FirAll Xàtiva - Feria del Ajo Tierno
location: Avenida Selgas, junto al Gran Teatro, Xàtiva
description: 10th anniversary edition of the tender garlic fair, combining agricultural tradition with local gastronomy, live music and family activities.

title: Feria Medieval del Marítimo - Mig Any Fester 2026
location: Paseo Marítimo de Valencia, junto al monumento al actor Antonio Ferrandis
description: A three-day medieval fair on Valencia's seafront promenade featuring 70 market stalls with artisans and food vendors, Arab and Christian dances, live music, children's parade, and cultural performances from Honduras, Bolivia and Spain.

title: Mig Any Fester Moros y Cristianos del Marítimo - Mercado Medieval
description: Large medieval fair with 70 market stalls, shows and children's Moors and Christians parade on Valencia's seafront promenade.

title: FirAll Xàtiva - X Feria del Ajo Tierno
description: Tenth anniversary edition of the tender garlic fair combining agricultural tradition, local gastronomy, live music and family activities.

title: Riba-roja és la Canya 2026
description: A three-day tapas route through approximately 15 bars and restaurants in Riba-roja de Túria, featuring quality tapas with drinks for €3.50, passport stamps for prizes, and a fun train connecting venues.

title: Dona Festival 2026
description: A 100% female musical afternoon event celebrating women's culture and music at Parc Central de Valencia.

title: Feria Medieval del Marítimo
description: A medieval fair with market, shows and children's entrance commemorating Mig Any Fester with over 20 years of tradition.

title: Apertura gratuita de monumentos y visitas guiadas a refugios antiaéreos
description: Free opening of monuments and guided tours of air raid shelters in Valencia.

title: FestIN
description: A festival combining culture and gastronomy that transforms emblematic spaces into unique sensory experiences through art, history and music.

title: Valencia Cuina Oberta
description: A gastronomic event featuring a record number of restaurants, Michelin stars and unique dining experiences.

title: Feria del Vehículo de Ocasión de Valencia
description: A used vehicle fair featuring nearly 30 brands offering semi-new and zero-kilometer cars with a new caravanning section.

title: III Fira del Vidre i l'Artesania
description: Glass and craftsmanship fair featuring demonstrations, a tourist train and wine fair.

title: Visitas guiadas sobre San Vicente Ferrer
description: Free guided tours discovering the figure of San Vicente Ferrer led by professional guides.

title: Visitas guiadas sobre fuentes históricas de Valencia
description: Free guided tours led by professional guides to discover the most historic ornamental fountains of Valencia.

title: Exposición de Karpa
description: A free exhibition celebrating the centenary of Valencian cartoonist Karpa with an immersive journey through his creative universe.

title: Visitas guiadas a refugios antiaéreos - Día Internacional de los Monumentos y Sitios 2026
location: Multiple locations (Ayuntamiento, calle Serranos, IES Lluís Vives, Falla Ripalda-Sogueros, Colegio Vedruna)
description: Guided tours of five Civil War air raid shelters in Valencia with limited groups and sessions in Spanish and Valencian. Tours take place Friday through Sunday with advance reservation required.

title: Conferencias sobre refugios antiaéreos - Día Internacional de los Monumentos y Sitios 2026
location: Refugio del Ayuntamiento de Valencia, calle Arzobispo Mayoral, 1
description: Afternoon program featuring presentations and conferences on the historical value of Civil War air raid shelters in Valencia, including talks on Civil War heritage and Valencia's shelter system.

title: III Fira del Vidre i l'Artesania de L'Olleria
location: Centro Histórico y Casa Santonja, L'Olleria
description: Glass and artisan fair featuring blown glass, ceramics, basketry with live demonstrations. Wine and gastronomy fair also on Saturday.

title: Gala Aniversario de los Grupos de la Federació de Folklore de la Comunitat Valenciana
location: Palau de la Música de Valencia, Sala Iturbi
description: A free gala celebrating over 50 years of Valencian folklore, featuring traditional dance groups including Grup de Ball de Torrent, Grup de Danses Arcude de la Vall d'Uixó, Grup de Danses de Villena, and Grup de Danses de l'Alcúdia. Entry is free until capacity is reached.

title: Gala de folklore valenciano
location: Palau de la Música de Valencia
description: A free gala featuring Valencian folklore groups at the Palau de la Música.

title: Jornada de puertas abiertas en el Jardín Botánico
description: Free open doors day at the Botanical Garden on International Day of Monuments and Sites.

title: Valencia NASCAR Fest 2026
description: American-inspired motorsport racing featuring truck and car races marking the start of the NASCAR Euro Series season with activities for all audiences.

title: Gran Fira del Comerç de Paterna
description: A local commerce fair featuring over 60 shops, concerts and a gastronomic area.

title: Feria Comercial de Canals
description: A commercial fair featuring local shops, associations and leisure activities on Vicente Ferri Avenue.

title: III Fira del Vidre i l'Artesania
location: Casa Santonja (Palau del Marau) and historic center of L'Olleria
description: L'Olleria celebrates the III Fair of Glass and Crafts with live demonstrations of traditional glasswork, artisan market with 23 exhibitors, patrimonial visits, and ViL'Olleria wine fair featuring 9 local wineries with gastronomy and live music.

title: Gran jornada de puertas abiertas en el Jardín Botánico de Valencia - Día Internacional de los Monumentos y Sitios 2026
location: Jardín Botánico de la Universitat de Valencia, calle Quart, nº80, Valencia
description: Open day at the Botanical Garden with free access during regular hours (10:00-20:00) and two free guided tours at 10:30 and 12:00 in Spanish and Valencian. The historic garden, declared a Cultural Interest Asset, features monumental trees, century-old palms, and valuable 19th-century architectural elements.

title: Gran Fira del Comerç de Paterna 2026
description: A large fair featuring over 60 local shops, workshops, exhibitions, concerts, and gastronomic zone across four differentiated spaces. The event includes live music tributes, creative workshops, fashion demonstrations, and various activities for families.

title: Mercado del vino y del embutido de Ontinyent
location: Mercado Municipal de Ontinyent, Plaça del Mercat, 1
description: A market event in Ontinyent featuring wine and cured meat tastings, local food products, live music, and traditional dishes like arroz al horno. The event is part of the 'Dissabtes de Mercat' program promoting local commerce and gastronomy.

title: Entrada gratuita a monumentos - Día Internacional de los Monumentos y Sitios 2026
location: La Lonja de los Mercaderes, Torres de Serranos, Torres de Quart
description: Free open day to three of Valencia's most visited monuments with full access throughout the day on Saturday, April 18.

title: TAP TAP · Mercadillo de variedades
description: Variety market at Mercado de Tapineria with diverse goods and products.

title: Tapa i Festa - Feria Gastronómica
description: Food truck fair at Glorieta featuring around twenty vendors offering Asian, Mexican, American, Japanese and Mediterranean cuisine, open daily from 10:00 to 02:00.

title: Tapa i Festa - Feria Gastronómica
description: A gastronomic fair featuring around twenty food trucks with varied cuisine including Asian, Mexican, American, Japanese and Mediterranean food, central bars with drinks, and other leisure and crafts spaces during the Moros y Cristianos festival.

title: Talleres Infantiles 'Dissabtes DiverActius'
description: Children's workshops offering fun and educational Saturday activities for kids.

title: Feria Andaluza de Valencia 2026
description: Major Andalusian festival celebration in Valencia bringing the culture and traditions of southern Spain to the city.

title: Feria Renacentista de Canals
description: Renaissance fair in Canals recreating historical atmosphere with period markets and activities.

title: Feria Andaluza de Valencia 2026
location: Jardín del Turia, entre el Puente de la Exposición y el Puente de las Flores
description: The 32nd edition of the Andalusian Fair in Valencia transforms the Turia Gardens into a celebration of southern Spanish culture with casetas, sevillanas dancing, live performances, and traditional gastronomy over ten days.

title: Feria Andaluza de Valencia 2026
description: The great Andalusian fair returns to Valencia, bringing southern Spanish festivities and culture to the city for ten days.

title: Secret Market Valencia - Edición Primavera 2026
description: Valencia's largest ephemeral fashion pop-up returns with over 25,000 items from top brands with discounts up to 70%. Features clothing, footwear, accessories for men, women and children, plus home décor section.

title: Feria Turística Calixto III
description: A three-day Renaissance fair featuring historical reenactments, falconry exhibitions, theatrical performances, artisan market, traditional gastronomy, and guided tours of the Torreón and Oratory, celebrating the birthplace of Pope Calixto III (Alfonso de Borja).

title: Feria Turística Calixto III
description: A three-day Renaissance festival celebrating the birthplace of Pope Calixto III (Alfonso de Borja) featuring historical reenactments, falconry exhibitions, theatrical scenes, crafts market, music, and guided tours of the Torreón.

title: Fiestas de Moros y Cristianos de Alcoy 2026
description: The Moors and Christians Festival of Alcoy 2026 honors Sant Jordi with three days of parades, processions, artillery demonstrations, and cultural celebrations declared of International Tourist Interest since 1980.

title: 61ª Feria del Libro de València
description: The 61st Valencia Book Fair featuring publishers, authors, and literary activities.

title: Urban Trend · Tendencias, Cultura y actividades urbanas
description: Urban trends market featuring culture and urban activities at Mercado de Tapineria.

title: Mercado Medieval de Cofrentes 2026
location: Cofrentes, desde Plaza Valle hasta el castillo de Cofrentes
description: A large medieval market in Cofrentes featuring jousting tournaments on horseback, over 120 free activities including street performers, artisan stalls, puppet theatre, and medieval reenactments over four days coinciding with La Maderada festival.

title: Mercado Medieval de Cofrentes 2026
location: Cofrentes - Plaza Valle hasta las faldas del castillo
description: A large medieval market in Cofrentes featuring jousting tournaments with horses, over 120 free activities including musicians, jugglers, craftsmen, medieval camps, puppet theater, and demonstrations of traditional trades across four days.

title: Mercado Medieval de Cofrentes 2026
location: Plaza Valle hasta las faldas del castillo de Cofrentes
description: A four-day medieval market in Cofrentes featuring over 120 free activities including jousting tournaments, artisan stalls, street performers, puppet theatre, and medieval reenactments.

title: Exposición de modelismo ferroviario con trenes en miniatura
location: Espai Baladre, carrer de la Rioja nº10, playa de Gandia
description: Free model railway exhibition featuring H0 scale trains (1:87) running through detailed miniature landscapes. Organized by Club Ibérico de Módulos H0 and Associació Tren Alcoi-Gandia during the May 1st long weekend.

title: THE LEGACY: Los clicks hacen historia
location: Museo Histórico Militar de Valencia, calle General Gil Dolz nº6
description: Free exhibition featuring 6 large Playmobil dioramas depicting important historical episodes of Spanish contributions to American history, including the discovery of Florida and California missions.

title: 4a Fira del Vi Natural de Pego
description: Fourth edition of the natural wine fair in Pego featuring over 30 producers, local gastronomy, live music, and artisan products. Entry includes a wine glass for tastings.

title: Quesalia 2026: la Feria del Queso y Maridaje de Chelva
description: The 5th edition of the Cheese and Pairing Fair in Chelva featuring artisan cheese market, wine tastings, cooking demonstrations, guided tours, children's workshops, and live music over a three-day weekend.

title: Romería hasta el río Cabriel - La Maderada
description: Traditional pilgrimage to the Cabriel River as part of La Maderada festivities, featuring participants dressed as traditional timber workers, music, popular breakfast, and the blessing of rafts in honor of ancestors.

title: Romería y homenaje al río Cabriel - La Maderada
location: Plaza de España, Cofrentes - Río Cabriel
description: Traditional pilgrimage to the Cabriel River as part of La Maderada festivities, a UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage celebration. Participants dress as timber rafters, enjoy traditional food and watch wooden rafts launched into the river.

title: Exhibición de vela latina - As. de Peixcadors de Catarroja
description: Traditional Latin sail exhibition departing from the Port of Catarroja, organized by the Fishermen's Association of Catarroja.

title: XVII Feria de los Pueblos Amigos de Benagéber
description: The XVII Festival of Friend Towns of Benagéber returns with music, gastronomy, and activities featuring casetas from various municipalities, cultural activities, and entertainment for all ages.

title: Exhibición de vela latina - As. Siglo XXI de Valencia
description: Traditional Latin sail exhibition departing from the Albufera Natural Park, organized by the Siglo XXI Association of Valencia.

title: La Mostra de Vins Terres dels Alforins 2026
description: The 13th edition of Mostra de Vins Terres dels Alforins brings together 13 wineries in La Font de la Figuera for a day of wine tastings, local gastronomy, live music, and festive atmosphere. Early bird tickets cost €15 (including 5 wine tastings and a silk-screened glass) until May 10, then €20 at the venue.

title: Mercado de coleccionismo Playmobil
location: Museo Histórico Militar de Valencia, calle General Gil Dolz nº6
description: Playmobil collectors market offering rare pieces, discontinued references and other collectibles for Playmobil enthusiasts.

title: Vinachest 2026 - Feria del Vino de Cheste
description: Wine fair featuring local wineries, gastronomic offerings, live music, and family activities showcasing the moscatel variety and local commerce in Cheste.

title: Alegría – Bajo Una Nueva Luz (Cirque du Soleil)
location: Gran carpa junto a la antigua Estación del Grao, Valencia
description: Cirque du Soleil returns to Valencia with Alegría – Bajo Una Nueva Luz, a contemporary reinterpretation of their iconic 1994 production featuring 54 international artists, live music, and spectacular acrobatics.

description: Traditional Latin sail exhibition departing from Mata del Rey, organized by the Latin Sail Association of Silla.

description: Traditional Latin sail exhibition departing from the Port of Catarroja, organized by the Fishermen's Association of Catarroja.

description: Traditional Latin sail exhibition departing from Mata del Rey, organized by the Latin Sail Association of Silla.

description: Traditional Latin sail exhibition departing from the Port of Sollana, organized by the Sollana Association.

description: Traditional Latin sail exhibition departing from Mata del Rey, organized by the Latin Sail Association of Silla.

description: Traditional Latin sail exhibition departing from the Albufera Natural Park, organized by the Latin Sail Association of El Palmar.

description: Traditional Latin sail exhibition 'Proba del Crist' departing from Mata del Rey, organized by the Latin Sail Association of Silla.

description: Traditional Latin sail exhibition 'Proba de les Canyes' in honor of the Sant Miquel festival, departing from the Port of Catarroja.

description: Traditional Latin sail exhibition departing from the Albufera Natural Park, organized by the Traditional Association of Silla.
